name: get_user
description: Retrieve a user by their unique identifier. Returns the user's profile information including name, email, and creation date.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user to retrieve

name: list_files
description: List files in a directory. Returns an array of file metadata including name, size, and modification time.

path.description: Directory path to list files from

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return

name: search_records
description: Search for records matching a query string. Supports pagination via cursor parameter.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous search result
